parameters.query:
SELECT json_build_object(
  'generated_at', now()::text,
  'projects', json_build_object(
    'total_active', (SELECT count(*) FROM projects WHERE status='active' AND current_phase NOT IN ('completed','archived')),
    'by_phase', (SELECT json_object_agg(current_phase, n) FROM (SELECT current_phase, count(*) AS n FROM projects WHERE status='active' AND current_phase NOT IN ('completed','archived') GROUP BY current_phase) t),
    'completed_last_30d', (SELECT count(*) FROM projects WHERE current_phase='completed' AND completed_at > now() - INTERVAL '30 days'),
    'oldest_active_days', (SELECT EXTRACT(DAY FROM now() - min(updated_at))::int FROM projects WHERE status='active' AND current_phase NOT IN ('completed','archived'))
  ),
  'contracts', json_build_object(
    'pending_signature', (SELECT count(*) FROM contracts WHERE status IN ('sent','ready_to_sign')),
    'expiring_7d', (SELECT count(*) FROM contracts WHERE status IN ('sent','ready_to_sign','draft') AND expires_at BETWEEN now() AND now() + INTERVAL '7 days'),
    'signed_last_30d', (SELECT count(*) FROM contracts WHERE status='signed' AND signed_at > now() - INTERVAL '30 days')
  ),
  'collaborators', json_build_object(
    'active_assignments', (SELECT count(*) FROM collab_assignments WHERE status NOT IN ('closed','cancelled','rejected','approved')),
    'overdue', (SELECT count(*) FROM collab_assignments WHERE status NOT IN ('approved','closed','cancelled','rejected') AND deadline IS NOT NULL AND deadline < now()::date),
    'pending_review', (SELECT count(*) FROM collab_assignments WHERE status='delivered' AND delivered_at < now() - INTERVAL '3 days')
  ),
  'aftercare', json_build_object(
    'open', (SELECT count(*) FROM aftercare_incidents WHERE status NOT IN ('resolved','closed','cancelled')),
    'urgent_open', (SELECT count(*) FROM aftercare_incidents WHERE status NOT IN ('resolved','closed','cancelled') AND severity IN ('high','critical'))
  ),
  'permits', json_build_object(
    'in_progress', (SELECT count(*) FROM permit_applications WHERE status NOT IN ('approved','rejected','withdrawn','expired'))
  ),
  'qc_checks', json_build_object(
    'open', (SELECT count(*) FROM qc_checks WHERE status IN ('open','in_progress','blocked'))
  ),
  'anomalies', json_build_object(
    'unreviewed', (SELECT count(*) FROM anomalies_detected WHERE status='detected')
  ),
  'consultations', json_build_object(
    'pending', (SELECT count(*) FROM consultation_queue WHERE status='pending')
  ),
  'finance', json_build_object(
    'invoices_pending_approval', (SELECT count(*) FROM invoices WHERE status='pending'),
    'invoices_paid_last_30d_total_eur', COALESCE((SELECT round(sum(total_amount)::numeric, 2) FROM invoices WHERE status='paid' AND paid_at > now() - INTERVAL '30 days'), 0)
  ),
  'energy_assessments', json_build_object(
    'projects_assessed', (SELECT count(DISTINCT project_id) FROM energy_assessments),
    'avg_demanda_total', (SELECT round(avg(demanda_total_kwh_m2_anyo)::numeric, 1) FROM energy_assessments WHERE demanda_total_kwh_m2_anyo IS NOT NULL)
  ),
  'home_automation', json_build_object(
    'proposals_total', (SELECT count(*) FROM home_automation_proposals),
    'accepted_last_90d', (SELECT count(*) FROM home_automation_proposals WHERE status='accepted' AND updated_at > now() - INTERVAL '90 days')
  ),
  'client_concierge', json_build_object(
    'questions_last_30d', (SELECT count(*) FROM client_conversations WHERE asked_at > now() - INTERVAL '30 days'),
    'escalation_rate_pct', (SELECT round(100.0 * count(*) FILTER (WHERE escalated) / NULLIF(count(*),0), 1) FROM client_conversations WHERE asked_at > now() - INTERVAL '30 days'),
    'cost_usd_last_30d', COALESCE((SELECT round(sum(llm_cost_usd)::numeric, 4) FROM client_conversations WHERE asked_at > now() - INTERVAL '30 days'), 0)
  ),
  'errors_last_24h', (SELECT count(*) FROM activity_log WHERE action='workflow_error' AND created_at > now() - INTERVAL '24 hours')
) AS dashboard;
